response: {"scan":{"run_id":"LSR-001-2026-06-12","result":"alerts_found","alerts":[{"id":"ALT-2026-06-12-01","confidence":"medium","source_headlines":["H03"],"latent_edge_hypothesis":"Drought in Gujarat could tighten availability or raise lead times for castor-derived feedstocks, creating a latent supply risk for the castor-derived polyol used in the conformal barrier resin on CMC-410.","real_world_prior":"Gujarat is a major hub for castor crop production and castor-derived chemical exports; drought can reduce agricultural output and propagate into specialty chemical supply chains with delay.","enterprise_path":["H03 reports deepening drought conditions across parts of Gujarat affecting agricultural export markets.","Aster Vale's CMC-410 BOM includes component CR-88 conformal barrier resin, which uses castor_derived_polyol as an input.","SUP-ARBCHEM supplies both CR-88 and castor_derived_polyol to Aster Vale.","CMC-410 has an open strategic order for 420 units, while available inventory is only 80 units.","If castor-derived polyol availability or lead time worsens, replenishment of CR-88 could be constrained during an existing inventory shortfall, exposing the open CMC-410 order."],"business_exposure":{"revenue_at_risk":3400000,"affected_orders":["SO-7731"],"affected_customers":["Atlantic Energy"],"constrained_inventory":true},"reasoning":"Observed facts: H03 states drought conditions are deepening in Gujarat and pressuring agricultural export markets. Company records show CMC-410 depends on CR-88 conformal barrier resin, whose inputs include castor_derived_polyol, and ArborChem supplies that component/input. Records also show only 80 CMC-410 units available against an open strategic order for 420 units from Atlantic Energy.
